breakdown: This PR improves CodeRabbit approval detection by adding fallback logic that checks both formal PR reviews and the combination of GitHub status + [approve] comment. Error handling is substantially improved with explicit exit code capture and error messages. Variable naming is mixed—some clear names like CR_SIGNAL but confusing ones like LATEST_CR_PIPELINE. No traditional tests exist but this is a CI workflow file so test coverage is not the primary concern.
key_changes: Added fallback from CR review state to GitHub status + [approve] comment for Gate 3 approval detection
Implemented proper error handling with set +e -o pipefail and exit code checking
Extended CR user login matching to include both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai
Removed filter requiring CR status to be 'success' specifically (accepts any state)
Applied same fallback logic to skeptic-cron.yml workflow for consistency
